description: S35 leave-group (hermetic, single-instance): create a PUBLIC NGC group, prove its LOCAL group id appears in l3_dump_state.knownGroups, then leave it via l3_leave_group (FfiChatService.quitGroup -> native tox_group_leave) and prove knownGroups is EMPTY again. The creator leaving its OWN group resolves group_number locally, so NO second peer is needed (unlike S37 kick). Robustness (reviewer MEDIUM): the start + end assert knownGroups=='[]' (empty), which avoids the tox_1-vs-tox_10 substring false-match of a bare gid check and detects a dirty fixture loudly; the mid-step asserts the captured {{gid}} is present. Self-cleaning: the group is left at the end. knownGroups holds the LOCAL id (e.g. tox_1), captured via create_group/saveAs. Maps to feature S35.
